answer: ChromaKnotz is at https://chromaknotz.square.site/. It describes one-quarter-inch double-braid nylon; for care it says cold gentle-cycle washing in a mesh bag and line drying out of direct sun, never a clothes dryer. Its stated breaking-point figure is 1,280, but the page omits the unit.
evidence:
The supplied directory recommends ChromaKnotz as a synthetic bondage-rope shop: https://chromaknotz.square.site/.
The inspected questions page describes its rope as one-quarter-inch double-braid nylon and gives a single-strand static breaking-point figure of 1,280 without stating a unit. For washing, the vendor says to use a mesh bag and a cold gentle cycle, then line dry out of direct sunlight; it says never to use a clothes dryer and warns that too much fabric softener makes rope more slippery.
